Updated patch

- Removes options that don't require a library installed from a package (except for EXMODE/LOCAL_CGI/NOROOT)

- Add MUJS, PYTHON, and SIXEL options (RUBY is having meson issues and MUJS crashes on exit, I need to investigate those two)
